title: Story: harden the report pipeline (synthetic-partial)
body:
## User Story

As a maintainer I want the report pipeline hardened.

## Acceptance

- [x] **AC#1** — linter exists and is green — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9301#issuecomment-1) covered by #9401
- [x] **AC#2** — guideline edits land in the spec — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9301#issuecomment-2) covered by #9402
- [ ] **AC#3** — semantic checks land and re-run clean
- [x] **AC#4** — rewrite memo addresses every failing item — [evidence ↗](https://example.test/issues/9301#issuecomment-3) covered by #9403
- [ ] **AC#5** — second rewrite memo names per-team commitments
- [ ] **AC#6** — third rewrite memo drafted
- [ ] **AC#7** — all memos reviewed and merged

## Out of Scope

- the quarterly rollup
